title: Cobblemon Megadex Modpack
description: A Cobblemon Modpack a made for me and a few friends.
body:
A Minecraft modpack I made centered around Cobblemon that is mainly made to be played by me and my friends.

Cobblemon is the very core of this pack, multiple of it's mod addons, datapacks, resource packs are included in order to stregthen the experience.

Multiple other mods such as Terralith, Sophisticated Backpacks, Waystones, etc... are also here to make a cosy experience to enjoy with friends.
